news.headline: Enstar Group Limited starts cash tender offer for all 5.750% Fixed-Rate Reset Junior Subordinated Notes due 2040.
news.summary: Enstar Group Limited, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ESGR, has initiated a cash tender offer named the "Tender Offer" on March 10, 2025, in Hamilton, Bermuda. This offer is for all of the outstanding 5.750% Fixed-Rate Reset Junior Subordinated Notes due 2040 that were issued by Enstar Finance LLC, a subsidiary fully owned by Enstar, and guaranteed by Enstar on a junior subordinated basis. The company aims to repurchase these Notes. The Offer encompasses a detailed set of information presented in a table format detailing the specifics of the Notes and the Tender Offer.

news.headline: US Witkoff: Intelligence sharing with Ukraine will be discussed in this week's meetings.
Trump may meet Xi in China as soon as April - SCMP
RCKRBX platform expands into Florida markets, gains new subscribers. Covers Jacksonville, Orlando, Tampa, West Palm Beach, Fort Lauderdale, Miami.
news.summary: In Washington, RCKRBX™ has introduced the initial SaaS platform for multifamily real estate, offering leading indicator data based on responses from numerous current and potential renters in particular markets. The platform, now expanding into various Florida regions, such as Jacksonville, Orlando, Tampa, West Palm Beach, Palm Beach, Fort Lauderdale, and Miami, is making significant strides. This move also involves a partnership with Camino Capital Management.

news.headline: US Witkoff: The US never shut off intelligence for anything defensive that Ukrainians need - Fox News interview
Northspyre wins Bronze Stevie Award in 2025 for Customer Experience in Commercial Real Estate Tech Support category. Celebrates improving customer retention.
news.summary: Northspyre, a leading real estate development management platform, has proudly received a Bronze Stevie Award for Achievement in Customer Experience in the Revolutionizing Commercial Real Estate (CRE) Tech Support category. The award recognizes companies that excel in enhancing the customer experience to retain existing customers. This prestigious accolade solidifies Northspyre's commitment to providing top-notch services in the industry.

news.headline: Bayshore Concrete and Landscape Materials rebrands as TriCircle Landscape Supply, reflecting growth and partnership with TriCircle Pavers.
news.summary: Located in Fort Myers, Florida, Bayshore Concrete and Landscape Materials has unveiled its rebranding to TriCircle Landscape Supply. This locally owned business, a key player in the concrete landscape supply sector, has decided to change its name to showcase its progress and close connection with TriCircle Pavers, its sister company. The rebranding is a strategic move to enhance the company's image in line with its broader vision. This update signifies a new phase in the company's growth as it continues to establish its presence in the industry.

news.headline: ExchangeRight serves over 9,000 investors with reliable wealth stewardship and consistent returns since 2012.
news.summary: ExchangeRight, a top provider of diversified real estate DST and REIT investments based in Pasadena, California, has gained the trust of over 9,000 investors. Since its establishment in 2012, the company has delivered consistent capital preservation and reliable returns, unaffected by economic fluctuations. Each investor has received monthly distributions from ExchangeRight that meet their financial goals.

news.headline: Study by Preservative Freedom Coalition shows need for better communication among glaucoma patients, eye care providers.
news.summary: Based in WALTHAM, Massachusetts, the Preservative Freedom Coalition, consisting of various stakeholders in eye health, revealed findings from a recent nationwide survey examining the experiences of individuals with glaucoma. The results of the Preservative Freedom Glaucoma Patient Experience survey highlight the urgent necessity for enhanced communication between glaucoma patients and their eye care professionals, especially regarding preservative use. The survey gathered insights from a significant number of participants nationwide, emphasizing the importance of addressing unmet needs in ocular surface disease management.

news.headline: Raoul Pal predicts market recovery in Q2 for Bitcoin and Solana, emphasizing patience and risk management.
news.summary: Macro strategist Raoul Pal recently discussed the current crypto market volatility, stressing the importance of patience and risk management for investors. In a podcast on March 1, Pal attributed the downturn to a typical correction in a bull market caused by tightened global financial conditions. He highlighted that financial conditions had tightened in the previous year due to the strengthening US dollar in anticipation of Trump's policies and rising interest rates in preparation for potential tariffs. Pal's advice underscores the necessity of strategic risk management during such market fluctuations.

news.headline: STMicroelectronics updates on common share repurchase program, current status of buyback in progress.
Lit Thinking and LECOM partner to enhance campus health with Visium sanitization devices. Installation at LECOM with help from channel partner Arnold Becker, COO of Pure Air Solutions of PA.
news.summary: In Erie, Pennsylvania, Lit Thinking has installed its innovative Visium continuous sanitization devices at Lake Erie College of Osteopathic Medicine (LECOM), revolutionizing the upkeep of indoor environments in busy locations. This initiative marks a pivotal step in promoting healthier spaces. The partnership with Pure Air Solutions of PA, guided by Arnold Becker, the COO, played a crucial role in the efficient installation and operation of Visium at LECOM. This strategic collaboration has introduced advanced sanitization technology to the college, enhancing its indoor air quality and setting an example for other institutions.

news.headline: ArmorCode enhances partner program to achieve 100% channel-first sales model, expand customer base for ASPM and RBVM.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, ArmorCode, a prominent AI-Powered Application Security Posture Management (ASPM) company, introduced the upgraded ArmorCode Partner Program. Aiming for a complete channel-first sales strategy, the program is tailored to expand ArmorCode’s client reach. The focus is to assist more customers in acquiring an autonomous governance strategy for ASPM and Risk-Based Vulnerability Management (RBVM) to shield against increasing dangers. Through this initiative, ArmorCode intends to bolster its customer base and promote a more secure online environment.

news.headline: TP-Link partners with Hoag Classic PGA TOUR turning Silver Level Sponsor in 2025, focusing on community in SoCal.
news.summary: Based in Irvine, California, TP-Link Systems Inc., a renowned provider of networking and smart home solutions globally, has proudly revealed its silver level sponsorship of the 2025 Hoag Classic. This event is highly esteemed on the PGA TOUR Champions circuit and attracts a top-tier field of professional golfers. The partnership underlines TP-Link’s dedication to fostering community connections in Southern California via its Connect & Care program. The Hoag Classic is known for its picturesque course and impressive lineup of players.

news.headline: Kinetic Technologies introduces KTB8400 OptiComp 2.4MHz, 3A buck-switching regulator, offering fast response and high efficiency.
news.summary: A company in San Jose, California, Kinetic Technologies, known for power management solutions, is growing its DC-DC Conversion offerings by launching the KTB8400 OptiComp™ buck switching regulator. This new product combines top features of various DC-DC control methods into a single design. The OptiComp regulator boasts rapid transient response, minimal variation in switching frequency regardless of load, high efficiency, and built-in compensation. The KTB8400 is suitable for numerous applications.

news.headline: Dialpad appoints 20-year Genesys veteran as Chief Customer Officer to enhance customer experiences. Also makes strategic executive appointments.
news.summary: In San Francisco today, Dialpad, a top Ai-powered communications intelligence platform, revealed the naming of David Sudbey, a 20-year Genesys veteran, as Chief Customer Officer. Sudbey's role is crucial in advancing Dialpad's goal of prioritizing human-first, Ai-enhanced customer experiences. Additionally, the company has expanded its global leadership team with key appointments: Kevin Williams as Associate Vice President of Sales for the Philippines, Ross Jack appointed as Director of Channel for EMEA, and Raymund Catli taking on the role of Country Manager and Director.

news.headline: Palladyne AI to take part in USSOCOM TE25-2 event on April 14-17 in Avon Park, FL. Artificial intelligence for defense.
news.summary: Palladyne AI Corp. (PDYN and PDYNW) has been chosen to participate in TE25-2: Collaborative Autonomy Integration, organized by the U.S. Special Operations Command (USSOCOM) Technical Experimentation Team. The event will be held from April 14-17, 2025, at Avon Park Air Force Range in Avon Park, Florida. Palladyne AI specializes in developing AI software for robotic platforms used in defense and commercial applications.

news.headline: Canela Media partners with Brightcove to enhance streaming service for multicultural audiences, expanding reach.
news.summary: Brightcove has recently added Canela Media, a prominent media customer, to its lineup to enhance its streaming service. This partnership aims to strengthen Brightcove's position in the industry and expand its reach to a wider audience. Canela Media's inclusion signifies a significant milestone for Brightcove and highlights its commitment to providing top-notch streaming solutions.

news.headline: Forescout awarded for enhancing OT and IoT Security, offering unmatched control and visibility in complex landscapes.
news.summary: A company based in San Jose, California, has been acknowledged for its efforts in enhancing security for Operational Technology (OT) and Internet of Things (IoT). Forescout was praised for its ability to offer exceptional visibility and control within intricate settings. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to improving security measures for critical infrastructure, signaling a significant advancement in the field.

news.headline: Celigo appoints George Mogannam as Chief Revenue Officer; will lead global revenue strategy, with over 25 years experience.
news.summary: An Integration Platform as a Service (iPaaS) provider based in Redwood City, California has appointed George Mogannam as their new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). In his new position, Mogannam will oversee Celigo's global revenue strategy, lead efforts in scaling sales and go-to-market teams, and work on expanding market share to bolster the company's growth. With over 25 years of experience in fast-growing tech firms, Mogannam is poised to drive Celigo forward in achieving its business objectives.

news.headline: 2025 iHeartRadio Music Awards on FOX to feature Bad Bunny, Billie Eilish, Kenny Chesney, Nelly, and more. LL COOL J to host. Live from Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, iHeartMedia and FOX Entertainment revealed that the upcoming 2025 iHeartRadio Music Awards will showcase performances from a star-studded lineup. The event, scheduled to broadcast live from the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles on Monday, March [date], will feature music acts including Bad Bunny, Billie Eilish, GloRilla, Gracie Abrams, Kenny Chesney, Muni Long, Nelly, and more. The renowned Hip-Hop artist LL COOL J, a Rock & Roll Hall of Fame inductee and two-time Grammy® Award winner, will once again serve as the host for the prestigious awards show.

news.headline: Capcom partners with Esports World Cup for 3 years in Saudi Arabia event.
news.summary: In Osaka, Japan, Capcom has revealed a three-year collaboration with the Esports World Cup Foundation for the Esports World Cup in Saudi Arabia.

news.headline: QuidelOrtho introduces Results Manager System for labs, (Nasdaq: QDEL) offers informatics solution for hospitals, point-of-care settings.
news.summary: QuidelOrtho Corporation has introduced the QuidelOrtho® Results Manager™ System to cater to the needs of modern laboratories. The system is now available for use and aims to meet the increasing demands of these facilities. Specifically designed for community hospitals and point-of-care settings, the Results Manager offers a smooth and easy-to-use interface. This system is part of QuidelOrtho's efforts to enhance informatics capabilities within their diagnostics portfolio. The company, listed on Nasdaq as QDEL, continues to strengthen its offerings with this new solution.

news.headline: Dawn G. Lepore named Chairman of Amperity's Board of Directors, bringing leadership experience in digital transformation.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Amperity, a leading AI-powered customer data platform, has appointed Dawn G. Lepore as Chairman of its Board of Directors. Lepore, a seasoned technology executive and former CEO of drugstore.com, brings extensive experience in digital transformation, financial services, and retail innovation to the role. With decades of leadership experience, Lepore is expected to provide valuable insights to Amperity. The company expressed excitement over her appointment, emphasizing her expertise in driving value from technology.

news.headline: ServiceNow acquires Moveworks to bring AI to every employee in every business area.(ServiceNow)
news.summary: A tech company based in Santa Clara, California, ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW), has recently revealed its plans to acquire Moveworks through a definitive agreement. This acquisition aims to merge ServiceNow's AI and automation capabilities with Moveworks’ front-end AI assistant and enterprise search technology. The goal is to enhance employee experiences across various business functions. Post-merger, ServiceNow, with thousands of AI agents already in place, will bolster its offerings in the realm of AI-powered solutions for business transformation.

news.headline: Global healthcare smart card reader market valued at $1.0 billion in 2024, set to reach $2.3 billion by 2030 with 13.8% CAGR, driven by EHR integration and patient data security demand - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on "Healthcare Smart Card Readers" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Healthcare Smart Card Readers was valued at US$1.0 Billion in 2024 and is forecasted to attain US$2.3 Billion by 2030, indicating a growth rate of 13.8% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future predictions to assist in making strategic business choices.

news.headline: AtScale partners with Databricks Genie for natural language querying, providing real-time insights across BI tools.
news.summary: In Boston, a recent partnership has been announced between AtScale and Databricks Genie, aiming to harness the power of AI for natural language querying. This collaboration is set to provide users with real-time insights across various BI tools. By integrating with Databricks Genie, AtScale is paving the way for more efficient and consistent data analysis. This move signifies a step forward in the industry's quest for enhanced data-driven decision-making.

news.headline: ECB's Nagel: Germany needs reforms, not just higher spending.
Global fusion biopsy market to reach US$0.91 billion by 2029 with 7.1% CAGR, driven by rising prostate cancer cases and advanced imaging technologies.
news.summary: The global fusion biopsy market, valued at US$0.61 billion in 2023, is set to increase at a CAGR of 7.1%, reaching US$0.65 billion in 2024 and an impressive US$0.91 billion by 2029. This growth is driven by the rising incidence of prostate cancer and the aging global population. Factors such as advancements in imaging and diagnostic technologies, improved healthcare infrastructure, and increased investments are fueling market expansion. Fusion biopsy systems combine MRI and ultrasound to create detailed prostate images for precise tissue targeting. The market is segmented by route type (transrectal, transperineal, others), with transperineal expected to have the highest CAGR. Equipment is projected to lead growth in the product segment, with prostate cancer applications driving market expansion due to increasing awareness and need for precise diagnostic methods.

news.headline: Telos Corporation reports 2024 Q4 and full year earnings. Stock symbol: TLS. Detailed results available on investor website.
news.summary: Telos Corporation, a prominent provider of cyber, cloud, and enterprise security solutions for highly secure organizations worldwide, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ as TLS, released this information on March 10, 2025, on its investor relations site at https://investors.telos.com.

news.headline: Reserva de la Familia by Jose Cuervo unveils its 2025 collector’s box by artist Ana Segovia, marking 30th anniversary.
news.summary: In TEQUILA, Mexico, Reserva de la Familia® by Jose Cuervo introduces its 2025 collector’s box, crafted by Mexican artist Ana Segovia. Titled “No Señorita, Esos Colores son Prohibidos,” the custom piece showcases traditional charrería attire, reflecting Mexican national identity with a charro suit in striking fluorescent and pastel hues. This release commemorates Reserva de la Familia's 30th anniversary, produced by the 11th generation of the family.

news.headline: StockX partners with Affirm to offer flexible payment plans for eligible shoppers in the US buying top brand items.
news.summary: In Detroit, StockX, a worldwide resale platform for modern culture items, has collaborated with Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM), a payment network empowering consumers and aiding merchants in boosting sales. Qualified StockX buyers in the U.S. can utilize Affirm’s adaptable payment options when buying sought-after products from popular brands such as adidas, Supreme, and Gucci. This move aims to improve the customer experience and provide greater payment flexibility.

news.headline: Xsolla introduces Xsolla Gold Gift Card, offering gamers a new payment method for virtual goods, aiming to tap into $5.3 trillion gift card market by 2033.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the renowned video game commerce company Xsolla has introduced the Xsolla Gold Gift Card. This innovative payment option is tailored to improve the purchasing, gifting, and redemption of virtual goods for gamers worldwide. The card is offered in both physical and digital versions, allowing players easy access to their preferred games on various platforms. With the global gift card sector expected to hit $5.3 trillion by 2033, Xsolla's Gold Gift Card aims to revolutionize the gaming experience for users.

news.headline: PAR Excellence Systems merges with TrackCore to expand healthcare industry services; follows recent acquisition, NotiSphere, in January 2025.
news.summary: CINCINNATI & GRAND RAPIDS, Mich.-- PAR Excellence Systems Inc. and TrackCore, Inc. have finalized a strategic merger. PAR, known for supply chain integrity in healthcare, and TrackCore, specializing in automated biological tissue tracking, have come together post PAR's acquisition of NotiSphere in January 2025. This combination marks a significant move in the industry, with the companies now offering enhanced solutions to their clientele.

news.headline: Estée Lauder appoints Dr. Matthew Walker as Global Sleep Science Advisor to enhance nighttime skincare research, leveraging his expertise.
news.summary: Estée Lauder has appointed Dr. Matthew Walker, PhD, as their inaugural Global Sleep Science Advisor to enhance their nighttime skincare research and innovation. Dr. Walker, a distinguished author and sleep scientist holding the position of Professor of Neuroscience and Psychology at the University of California, Berkeley, aims to educate consumers on the significant relationship between sleep and health. This strategic move by Estée Lauder underlines their commitment to advancing in the realm of skincare and utilizing Dr. Walker's expertise in the global sleep movement.

news.headline: CAM Integrated Solutions launches new North Carolina division to better serve customers, marking a milestone in its growth.
news.summary: CAM Integrated Solutions (CAM), a top engineering and project management provider, is excited to establish CAM Integrated Solutions North Carolina, expanding its operations. This development signifies a major step in CAM’s growth, enhancing its ability to cater to customers in the area with a focus on excellence and innovation. The new division in North Carolina will soon be up and running, enabling CAM to better serve its clients in the region.

news.headline: New York bodegas launch Bird Flu Bailout amid egg shortages, offering plant-based eggs; 50+ stores participating.
news.summary: In New York City, the bird flu outbreak has led to egg shortages and record-high prices, impacting bodegas in particular. To assist customers, some bodegas began selling single eggs or "loosies" in January, while others added surcharges to menu items. In response, over 50 independent bodegas across the city are introducing plant-based eggs as part of the Bird Flu Bailout initiative starting Monday. This move aims to provide an alternative solution to the ongoing crisis.

news.headline: Southern Glazer's appoints Jennifer Chaplin Tolkin as EVP, Managing Director, Campari, effective April 1.
news.summary: In an announcement made by Southern Glazer’s in Miami and Dallas, it was revealed that Jennifer Chaplin Tolkin has been selected as the new Executive Vice President and Managing Director of Campari within the company. Her appointment is set to become effective as of April 1.

news.headline: Amos Hochstein joins TWG Global as Managing Partner, focusing on strategy in AI, energy, and infrastructure.
news.summary: In New York, TWG Global, a diversified holding company led by Mark Walter and Thomas Tull, has appointed Amos Hochstein as a Managing Partner. Hochstein will concentrate on the firm’s strategy and opportunities in AI, energy, and infrastructure. With extensive leadership background in government and industry, he joins TWG to bring his expertise to the company’s ventures. This move signifies TWG’s commitment to strengthening its position in various sectors.

news.headline: Convergent Energy's storage system provided backup power to 400 Potomac Edison customers during winter storm.Characters: 91
news.summary: In Little Orleans, Maryland, Convergent Energy and Power revealed that a battery energy storage system they managed offered backup power to about 400 Potomac Edison customers amid a recent winter storm. The system, with a capacity of 1.75 MW / 8.4 MWh, was specifically constructed to aid customers in a rural section of Allegany and Was counties.

news.headline: Country artist Alexandra Kay partners with Arden to launch exclusive outdoor cushion collection. Exciting collaboration combining music and outdoor furnishings.
news.summary: Country musician Alexandra Kay has partnered with Arden, a subsidiary of Central Garden & Pet Company (NASDAQ: CENT) (NASDAQ: CENTA), a prominent outdoor furnishings company, to create a unique collection of long-lasting and fashionable outdoor cushions. This collaboration coincides with Kay's ongoing tour, merging her love for writing music outdoors with Arden's expertise in outdoor furniture. The joint venture, known as the Alexandra Kay x Arden Collection, includes three distinct designs.

news.headline: HeartSciences Inc. partners with Integrous Communications to improve investor communications on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: HeartSciences Inc., based in Southlake, TX, revealed on March 10, 2025, that they have enlisted Integrous Communications, a top-tier investor relations firm, to strengthen connections with investors and the investment community. HeartSciences, listed on Nasdaq under HSCS and HSCSW, specializes in AI-driven medical technology to revolutionize ECGs/EKGs for early heart disease detection and life-saving interventions. This strategic move aims to improve communication strategies regarding the company's vision and operations with important stakeholders.

news.headline: Brian Krause has been appointed as Chief Revenue Officer at Aware, taking on responsibility for end-to-end revenue.
news.summary: A highly skilled professional has taken on the complete responsibility for managing the revenue cycle from start to finish. This individual will oversee all aspects of generating income, including sales, billing, and collections. This move is expected to streamline operations and improve financial performance.

news.headline: Cascade has launched new Platinum Plus to tackle tough meal cleanups, claiming to remove up to 100% of food residue.
news.summary: Cascade®, the top-rated dishwasher detergent brand in the United States, has introduced the enhanced Cascade Platinum Plus to tackle consumers' main issues of stubborn food residues, challenging grease, and dish spotting. The new formula promises to eliminate up to 100% of food particles and provide a near-spotless shine and dry. Comedian Kenan Thompson has been brought on board for a promotional campaign to showcase the product's performance and endorse its effectiveness.

news.headline: Big Blue Swim School reminds families to review water safety tips before spring break.
news.summary: As families prepare for spring break, Big Blue Swim School in Chicago is reminding them to review crucial water safety tips. Prior to their vacations, they should ensure they are well-informed on these essential precautions.

news.headline: Bobbie Labs unveils USDA Organic Whole Milk Infant Formula, the first in US market. Launching in April 2025 after 3 years, the formula is made in Ohio.
news.summary: Today in Heath, Ohio, Bobbie Labs introduced their fourth formula since the brand's inception in 2021. The culmination of three years of research and development has led to the unveiling of Bobbie Organic Whole Milk Infant Formula, set to hit shelves in April 2025. This unique USDA Organic Whole Milk formula marks a significant milestone as the first of its kind in the US market. Produced at Bobbie's cutting-edge manufacturing plant in Ohio, this offering is a standout as America's sole USDA Organic Whole Milk infant formula option.

news.headline: GoodRx revealed a gender gap in prescription costs, showing women spent $8.8 billion more than men in 2024.
news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, GoodRx (Nasdaq: GDRX) has revealed a report titled "The Prescription Drug Gender Divide," which highlights the disparity in out-of-pocket costs between men and women in the United States. The data from 2024 shows that women had a $8.8 billion higher out-of-pocket spending on prescription medications compared to men, representing a 30% difference. This significant variance places an increased financial burden on women, especially when coupled with their typical roles in careers, family planning, and caregiving duties.

news.headline: flyExclusive launches new Jet Club providing simplified private jet membership with 365-day access, rates, and service perks.
news.summary: In Kinston, North Carolina, flyExclusive, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN: FLYX) introduced its newest Jet Club, catering to individuals seeking year-round access, transparency, and top-tier service in private jet charters. This membership offers fixed rates, additional funding benefits, and assured availability for flyExclusive's premium services. The Jet Club aims to provide a straightforward and high-quality experience for members.

news.headline: HanesBrands refinanced $2026 million, securing $1.1 billion term loan B, $750 million revolving credit, and $400 million term loan A.
news.summary: HanesBrands Inc. (NYSE: HBI) in Winston-Salem, N.C. revealed the finalization of refinancing its 2026 maturities. The company completed the process by securing an increased new senior secured term loan B facility totaling $1.1 billion due in 2032, a fresh senior secured revolving credit facility of $750 million maturing in 2030, and a new senior secured term loan A facility of $400 million maturing in 2030. This has enabled the company to successfully manage its debt obligations and strengthen its financial position.

news.headline: i3 Verticals partners with West Virginia Supreme Court to launch WVPASS, providing access to 1999 court case info online.
news.summary: i3 Verticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: IIIV) revealed the launch of its JusticeTech® solution in West Virginia, known as the West Virginia Public Access Search System (WVPASS). This system permits residents in all 55 counties to access and download publicly accessible circuit court case data from 1999 onwards through their computer or mobile device. With this, individuals can evade the need to physically visit a courthouse for case searches.
